issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as API failures or invalid email addresses.
Only one example is provided, which does not fully demonstrate the breadth of the skill.
Missing checksum verification for npm and pip installations.

scenarios.name: Bulk personalized send to 8,000 users
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses dynamic templates with per-recipient dynamicTemplateData and batches at the 1000 messages/call SendGrid limit; baseline loops sgMail.send with inline HTML and misses both the template approach and batching limit.

scenarios.name: Event webhook for bounces and unsubscribes
scenarios.rationale: Treatment parses the events array, handles bounce, spamreport, and unsubscribe with distinct DB updates per the skill's webhook example; baseline covers bounce/unsubscribe generically but misses the spamreport branch and events-array shape.
